industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Clear Peak Energy, Inc.
summary: Clear Peak Energy, Inc., through its subsidiary, US 3D Printing Inc., focuses on the development of resins, software applications, printer technologies, and casting materials and techniques. The company was formerly known as Wavenetworx, Inc. and changed its name to Clear Peak Energy, Inc. in January 2010. Clear Peak Energy, Inc. was founded in 1999 and is based in Murray, Utah.
